[[Ealor]] was a temperate [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Bysis system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]' [[Parmic sector/Legends|Parmic sector]]. It was covered with grasslands and temperate [[Forest/Legends|forests]].

{{Planet-stub}}
